_notes.build: Single-threaded UMD build. Multi-threaded (with ffmpeg-core.worker.js) is gated behind COOP/COEP headers and lands in Phase 21.
_notes.loading: loaded by src/engines/_shared/ffmpeg/index.ts via FFmpeg.load({ coreURL: '/ffmpeg/ffmpeg-core.js', wasmURL: '/ffmpeg/ffmpeg-core.wasm' }). Both URLs are same-origin to honor the project's connect-src 'self' privacy guarantee.
